Still / Motion Graphics Designer Job at Lane Nigeria




        
    

        
        Lane Nigeria is an all-in-one travel and mobility platform built to simplify how people move, stay, and explore. We connect travelers with hotels, flights, buses, trains, car rentals, boat cruises, jet charters, events, and other travel services through one seamless booking experience.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Still / Motion Graphics Designer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Department: Design

About this Role


	Talented and Professional Still and Motion Graphics Designer needed


Requirements
     

            
    




	Graphics Designer skills, ND-B.Sc educational Qualification


Salary
N100,000 - N200,000 / Month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Public Relations & Content Creation Officer II",
  "description": "KannyVic Enterprise Consult - Our client, a reputable organization is&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Public Relations &amp; Content Creation Officer II

Job Location: Delta
Employment Type: Full-time (Travel to Project Sites Required)

Description


	A reputable organization is seeking to recruit a smart, confident, creative, media-savvy, and highly professional Public Relations &amp; Content Creation Officer to drive its corporate communications, public relations, digital media presence, and brand reputation.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for creating compelling written, visual, and digital content that professionally showcases the organization&#39;s projects, activities, corporate milestones, community engagements, and stakeholder initiatives across multiple communication platforms.
	This role requires an exceptional storyteller who can write, present, interview, create engaging content, manage social media platforms, coordinate media activities, and represent the organization professionally before clients, partners, government agencies, communities, and the general public.
	The ideal candidate should be comfortable speaking on camera, conducting interviews, preparing press-style communications, developing communication strategies, and working closely with the cinematography and media production team to produce high-quality corporate content.


Key Responsibilities
The successful candidate will be responsible for:


	Developing and implementing the organization&#39;s public relations and communication strategy.
	Creating engaging content for social media platforms, websites, newsletters, brochures, annual reports, and corporate publications.
	Writing press releases, news articles, speeches, corporate statements, success stories, and project updates.
	Managing the organization&#39;s social media accounts and ensuring consistent brand messaging.
	Developing content calendars and communication campaigns.
	Conducting interviews with staff, clients, beneficiaries, and stakeholders.
	Presenting projects and corporate activities professionally on camera.
	Coordinating media coverage for corporate events, project launches, exhibitions, conferences, and stakeholder engagements.
	Working closely with the Cinematographer &amp; Video Production Team to produce compelling multimedia content.
	Monitoring media coverage and managing the organization&#39;s public image.
	Responding professionally to public enquiries and supporting crisis communication when required.
	Supporting employer branding, recruitment campaigns, and internal communications.
	Building and maintaining positive relationships with journalists, media organizations, influencers, government agencies, and other stakeholders.
	Monitoring social media performance and preparing periodic communication reports.


Requirements
Applicants should possess:


	HND, Bachelor&#39;s Degree, or higher qualification in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Media Studies, English, Marketing, Communications, International Relations, Digital Media, or a related discipline.
	3&ndash;5 years of practical experience in public relations, corporate communications, journalism, media, content creation, digital marketing, or brand management.
	Excellent writing, editing, proofreading, and storytelling skills.
	Strong knowledge of Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), TikTok, YouTube, and other social media platforms.
	Experience creating professional content for corporate organizations.
	Excellent presentation and public speaking skills.
	Strong interpersonal and stakeholder engagement abilities.
	Ability to confidently appear on camera and conduct interviews.
	Knowledge of Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, CapCut, or similar content creation tools is an added advantage.
	Experience working with photographers, videographers, and media production teams.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work independently, meet deadlines, and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
	Must be willing to travel regularly to farms, project sites, rural communities, client locations, and corporate events across Nigeria.


Remuneration


	Competitive and Negotiable
	Salary will be based on qualifications, communication skills, writing ability, creativity, portfolio quality, practical assessment, and interview performance.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "KannyVic Enterprise Consult"
    
  },

Public Relations & Content Creation Officer II Job at KannyVic Enterprise Consult




        
    

        
        KannyVic Enterprise Consult - Our client, a reputable organization is  recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Public Relations & Content Creation Officer II

Job Location: Delta
Employment Type: Full-time (Travel to Project Sites Required)

Description
     

            
    




	A reputable organization is seeking to recruit a smart, confident, creative, media-savvy, and highly professional Public Relations & Content Creation Officer to drive its corporate communications, public relations, digital media presence, and brand reputation.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for creating compelling written, visual, and digital content that professionally showcases the organization's projects, activities, corporate milestones, community engagements, and stakeholder initiatives across multiple communication platforms.
	This role requires an exceptional storyteller who can write, present, interview, create engaging content, manage social media platforms, coordinate media activities, and represent the organization professionally before clients, partners, government agencies, communities, and the general public.
	The ideal candidate should be comfortable speaking on camera, conducting interviews, preparing press-style communications, developing communication strategies, and working closely with the cinematography and media production team to produce high-quality corporate content.


Key Responsibilities
The successful candidate will be responsible for:


	Developing and implementing the organization's public relations and communication strategy.
	Creating engaging content for social media platforms, websites, newsletters, brochures, annual reports, and corporate publications.
	Writing press releases, news articles, speeches, corporate statements, success stories, and project updates.
	Managing the organization's social media accounts and ensuring consistent brand messaging.
	Developing content calendars and communication campaigns.
	Conducting interviews with staff, clients, beneficiaries, and stakeholders.
	Presenting projects and corporate activities professionally on camera.
	Coordinating media coverage for corporate events, project launches, exhibitions, conferences, and stakeholder engagements.
	Working closely with the Cinematographer & Video Production Team to produce compelling multimedia content.
	Monitoring media coverage and managing the organization's public image.
	Responding professionally to public enquiries and supporting crisis communication when required.
	Supporting employer branding, recruitment campaigns, and internal communications.
	Building and maintaining positive relationships with journalists, media organizations, influencers, government agencies, and other stakeholders.
	Monitoring social media performance and preparing periodic communication reports.


Requirements
Applicants should possess:


	HND, Bachelor's Degree, or higher qualification in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Media Studies, English, Marketing, Communications, International Relations, Digital Media, or a related discipline.
	3–5 years of practical experience in public relations, corporate communications, journalism, media, content creation, digital marketing, or brand management.
	Excellent writing, editing, proofreading, and storytelling skills.
	Strong knowledge of Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), TikTok, YouTube, and other social media platforms.
	Experience creating professional content for corporate organizations.
	Excellent presentation and public speaking skills.
	Strong interpersonal and stakeholder engagement abilities.
	Ability to confidently appear on camera and conduct interviews.
	Knowledge of Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, CapCut, or similar content creation tools is an added advantage.
	Experience working with photographers, videographers, and media production teams.
	Ability to  work independently, meet deadlines, and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
	Must be willing to travel regularly to farms, project sites, rural communities, client locations, and corporate events across Nigeria.


Remuneration


	Competitive and Negotiable
	Salary will be based on qualifications, communication skills, writing ability, creativity, portfolio quality, practical assessment, and interview performance.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Social Media Manager Job at Agrinova Limited




        
    

        
        Agrinova Limited - We are into allocating land to clients and planting palm fruit.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Abraham Adesanya, Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a creative and results-driven NYSC Corper, that will be managing our brand's presence across social media platforms.
	The ideal candidate will create engaging content, grow online communities, execute social media campaigns, and analyse performance to strengthen brand awareness and support business objectives.


Requirements


	HND / BSc in Mass Communication, theatre art, (or equivalent) to related field.
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in social media
	Must be NYSC Corp member
	Must reside in or around Abraham Adesanya
	Creativity and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Develop, plan, and execute social media content calendars across platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, and YouTube.
	Create engaging posts, captions, reels, stories, and other multimedia content aligned with the brand voice.
	Manage social media campaigns to drive engagement, traffic, and lead generation.
	Stay updated on industry trends, platform updates, and emerging social media best practices.
	Collaborate with designers, content writers, and marketing teams to deliver integrated campaigns.
	Monitor competitor activities and recommend strategies to improve brand visibility.
	Ensure all content complies with brand guidelines and organizational policies.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using “Social Media Manager” as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Ngcom Network Solutions is a telecommunication company that provide internet services to individual and businesses. Our focus is on delivering reliable fast and affordable internet solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Source, evaluate, and negotiate with suppliers and vendors.
	Prepare and process purchase orders and procurement documentation.
	Obtain quotations and compare prices to ensure value for money.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate purchases to avoid stock shortages.
	Track orders and ensure timely delivery of goods and services.
	Maintain accurate procurement records and supplier databases.
	Ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and procedures.
	Resolve supplier issues related to quality, pricing, or delivery.
	Work closely with other departments to understand procurement needs and requirements.


Requirements


	OND, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Procurement, Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Previous experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain is an advantage.
	Strong negotiation and communication skills.
	Good analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel.
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and organizational skills.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: preciousbamigboye4@gmail.com using &quot;Procurement Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Procurement Officer Job at Ngcom Network Solutions




        
    

        
        Ngcom Network Solutions is a telecommunication company that provide internet services to individual and businesses. Our focus is on delivering reliable fast and affordable internet solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Source, evaluate, and negotiate with suppliers and vendors.
	Prepare and process purchase orders and procurement documentation.
	Obtain quotations and compare prices to ensure value for money.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate purchases to avoid stock shortages.
	Track orders and ensure timely delivery of goods and services.
	Maintain accurate procurement records and supplier databases.
	Ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and procedures.
	Resolve supplier issues related to quality, pricing, or delivery.
	Work closely with other departments to understand procurement needs and requirements.


Requirements


	OND, HND, or Bachelor's Degree in Procurement, Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Previous experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain is an advantage.
	Strong negotiation and communication skills.
	Good analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel.
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and organizational skills.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Procurement Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
